user.title: Add a Tactical Traps lock
user.description: Pick the lock's Bluetooth address (or type it as AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF) and enter its PIN. The lock must be powered and in range of a Bluetooth adapter or proxy, and the phone app must be closed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or the PIN was rejected. Check that the lock is in range and powered, the phone app is closed, and the PIN is correct.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This lock is already set up.

data_description.auto_relock_seconds: After an unlock, automatically re-engage the lock this many seconds later. Important for gravity-drop cabinets where the lock holds the door. 0 disables it.
